response:
<<THE RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE>>  
<<THE ASSISTANT COLLECTS DATA FROM A SAMPLE OF 50 PATIENTS, RECORDING THEIR BLOOD PRESSURE BEFORE AND AFTER ADMINISTERING THE DRUG>>  
<<THE DATA COLLECTED IS AS FOLLOWS>>  
<<PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: X_1, X_2, ..., X_50>>  
<<POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE: Y_1, Y_2, ..., Y_50>>  
<<ASSUME THAT THE PRE-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES X_i ARE NORMAL WITH MEAN MU_X AND VARIANCE SIGMA_X^2>>  
<<THE POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURES Y_i ARE NORMAL WITH MEAN MU_Y AND VARIANCE SIGMA_Y^2>>  
<<LET THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i BE SIGMA_XY>>  
<<DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X^2, SIGMA_Y^2, AND SIGMA_XY>>  
<<TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE>>  
<<FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs>>  
<<STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES, THE TEST STATISTIC, AND THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF ALPHA = 0.05>>  
<<THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS>>  
<<IN YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE, REFRAIN FROM THE USE OF ANY COMMAS>>  
<<ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITH SQUARE BRACKETS>>  
<<THE RESPONSE MUST START AND END WITH THE SAME WORD>>  
<<THE RESPONSE MUST BE IN ENGLISH AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS>>  
<<WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS>>
